title: I TOPA HONG ITNA LAMDANG HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I Topa hong itna lamdang hi
Mawhna, khialhna i neih hang tampi,
Lian zaw tham lai hong
hehpih na si,
Kalani mual tung ah hong bua hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong hehpih na, i mawhna
hong
maisak, siangsak hi, Pasian itna,
I mawhna teng sangin lian zaw hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna lungkiat
na’n tui khang bang in.
Ka kha hong sut nuam hong to laitak,
Gen zawh loh lian zaw hehpih na
in,
Ka belh ding Singlamteh pi hong lak

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kiseelzo nawn kei i mawhna nin,
Bang a
om diam hong sawp zo lai ding,
En un, hia-a luang sisan gunpi’n,
Vuk sang hong ngo zaw sak
pah thei ding

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Lamdang kicing hehpihna lian zaw,
A um khempeuh A hong piak khong
hi,
A mai a mu nuamte khempeuh aw,
Saang pak ve un hong hehpih na hi.
